summary: Iteration 115: Starseed Cosmic Realm multiplayer system fully tested. All 21 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed - world event banner with countdown, star map canvas, Realm/Ranks/Alliances tabs, Find Encounter button, NPC encounter generation with AI narrative and 3 choices, encounter resolution with stat changes and XP, alliance creation/viewing, leaderboard with ranked players and crowns.
seed_data_creation: Created alliance TEST_Cosmic_Alliance_1774866056 during backend testing. Multiple encounters generated and resolved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Starseed Cosmic Realm multiplayer system fully implemented and tested. Features: World events (rotate every 6 hours), heartbeat presence system, active players list, leaderboard sorted by level, NPC encounters with AI-generated narratives (GPT-4o, 5-15s), encounter resolution with stat changes/XP/achievements, alliance system (create/join/view, max 6 members). Key data-testids: starseed-realm-page, world-event-banner, realm-star-map, realm-tab-realm/leaderboard/alliances, find-encounter-btn, encounter-scene, encounter-narrative, encounter-choices, encounter-choice-0/1/2, encounter-result, encounter-continue-btn, realm-leaderboard, realm-alliances, alliance-name-input, create-alliance-btn, enter-realm-btn (on StarseedAdventure page), dashboard-action-realm.

backend_api.GET /api/starseed/realm/world-event: PASS - Returns current world event with title, description, bonus, time_remaining, remaining_seconds
backend_api.POST /api/starseed/realm/heartbeat: PASS - Updates player presence, requires auth
backend_api.GET /api/starseed/realm/active-players: PASS - Returns list of active players with character info, requires auth
backend_api.GET /api/starseed/realm/leaderboard: PASS - Returns top players sorted by level descending, requires auth
backend_api.POST /api/starseed/realm/encounter/reque: PASS - Generates NPC encounter with AI narrative and 3 choices, requires auth
backend_api.POST /api/starseed/realm/encounter/resol: PASS - Applies stat changes, XP, checks achievements, requires auth
backend_api.POST /api/starseed/realm/alliance/create: PASS - Creates alliance, assigns leader, requires auth
backend_api.POST /api/starseed/realm/alliance/join: PASS - Joins existing alliance, requires auth
backend_api.GET /api/starseed/realm/alliances: PASS - Returns all alliances, requires auth
backend_api.GET /api/starseed/realm/my-alliance: PASS - Returns user's current alliance, requires auth
backend_api.GET /api/starseed/realm/encounter-histor: PASS - Returns user's past encounters, requires auth

frontend_ui.world_event_banner: PASS - data-testid='world-event-banner' shows 'Arcturian Gateway Activation' with countdown
frontend_ui.realm_tab: PASS - data-testid='realm-tab-realm' switches to realm view
frontend_ui.leaderboard_tab: PASS - data-testid='realm-tab-leaderboard' shows ranked players with crowns
frontend_ui.alliances_tab: PASS - data-testid='realm-tab-alliances' shows alliance details or create form
frontend_ui.encounter_scene: PASS - data-testid='encounter-scene' shows two player portraits
frontend_ui.encounter_result: PASS - data-testid='encounter-result' shows stat changes and XP earned
frontend_ui.enter_realm_btn: PASS - data-testid='enter-realm-btn' on StarseedAdventure page links to realm

ai_integration_notes.encounter_generation: GPT-4o via emergentintegrations.llm.chat - 5-15 seconds response time
ai_integration_notes.npc_characters: Named NPCs like 'Thalok the Tidecaller', 'Aelara the Lightweaver', etc.
